input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.4.1
            TITLE: all airflow to the engine(s) must pass through a single circular restrictor placed in the intake

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.4.1: All airflow to the engine(s) must pass through a single circular restrictor placed in the intake
IC.2.4.1 All airflow to the engine(s) must pass through a single circular restrictor placed in the intake 
system.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 79 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: All airflow to the engine(s) must pass through a single circular restrictor placed in the intake system.
